title: Cobblemon With friends
description: This modpack is for a big friend group that wants to have fun. it is cobblemon and idustrial craft to make the experience more fun
body:
PokePlanet Cobblemon is a custom pokemon modpack that was created for a fun experience with friends

It contains Cobblemon along with othermods to help make the players experience better over time the pack will update to contain new quests , tips and tricks.

Features As version 1.0.0

   
    Shiny Chance is set at 8192
    Questline explaining the modpack and some of it's features
    The create mod
    being able to fly on cobblemons 
    alot of extra structures


Planned Features

    Legendary spawns
    Competitions for Trainers
    Quests further expanded over time
    More structers and industrial mods
    and much more
